allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge branch ''main'' into server

解决合并冲突:
- ClubInfo.vue: 保留简洁的标签格式
- ClubWarrank.vue: 合并新增的红淬排序和积分排序按钮
- ClubCarKing.vue: 保留简洁的标签格式
- package-lock.json: 使用main分支版本

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(for file in src/components/Club/CarScoreInfo.vue src/components/Club/ClubInfo.vue src/components/Club/ClubWeirdTowerInfo.vue src/components/Club/PeachInfo.vue src/components/Tower/TowerStatus.vue src/components/Tower/WeirdTowerStatus.vue)

Bash(python3 -c " with open\(''src/stores/tokenStore.ts'', ''rb''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) # Find lines with non-UTF8 or mojibake patterns lines = content.split\(b''\\n''\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines, 1\): try: decoded = line.decode\(''utf-8''\) # Check for common mojibake patterns \(GBK read as latin1\) if any\(ord\(c\) > 127 for c in decoded\): print\(f''{i}: {decoded[:100]}''\) except: print\(f''{i}: [decode error]''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " with open\(''src/stores/tokenStore.ts'', ''rb''\) as f: content = f.read\(\) lines = content.split\(b''\\n''\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines, 1\): try: decoded = line.decode\(''utf-8''\) if any\(ord\(c\) > 127 for c in decoded\): print\(f''{i}: {repr\(decoded[:120]\)}''\) except Exception as e: print\(f''{i}: [decode error: {e}]''\) ")

Bash(node -e " const fs = require\(''fs''\); const content = fs.readFileSync\(''src/stores/tokenStore.ts'', ''utf8''\); const lines = content.split\(''\\n''\); lines.forEach\(\(line, i\) => { if \(/[^\\x00-\\x7F]/.test\(line\)\) { console.log\(\(i+1\) + '': '' + line.substring\(0, 120\)\); } }\); ")
